consignor.invoice_value: ERICSSON AB Torshamnsgatan 21-23 S-164 83 STOCKHOLM, SWEDEN
consignor.motivation: Consignor "ERICSSON AB" from Sweden in the certificate is explicitly identified in the invoice header and address block with corresponding name and country. Minor difference in street address numbering accepted as normal variation. Hence, consignor matches (rules 4.1.0, 4.1.4).

consignee.certificate_value: KCELL JSC ALIMZHANOVA STREET 51 050004 ALMATY KAZAKHSTAN
consignee.invoice_value: KCELL JSC ALIMZHANOVA STREET 51, 050004 ALMATY, KAZAKHSTAN
consignee.motivation: Consignee "KCELL JSC" from Kazakhstan is explicitly present in the invoice in delivery address and matches exactly the certificate consignee with matching country. Verified in primary invoice fields (rules 4.2.0.1, 4.2.3).

goods_description.certificate_value: TELECOM EQUIPMENT PL - AIR 3258 B78V and HWACs
goods_description.invoice_value: Telecommunication Equipment: AIR 3258 B78V and HWACs
goods_description.motivation: The article description in the certificate "TELECOM EQUIPMENT PL - AIR 3258 B78V and HWACs" corresponds to detailed lines in the invoice describing "AIR 3258 B78V and HWACs" under telecommunication equipment category. Although the invoice has a more detailed hierarchical breakdown, the main product terms match. No article numbers are given in certificate, so priority 1 not activated; text matches sufficiently under normalizations (rule 4.3.2).

quantity.motivation: Certificate quantity is 42 packages with gross weight 5298,000 KG. Invoice shows 42 boxes with corresponding total GROSS WEIGHT 5 298,000 kg. The numeric values match exactly considering allowed normalizations (decimal and thousands separator). Hence, quantity matches per rules 4.4.3 and 4.4.4.

origin.motivation: Country of origin "PL" (Poland) is clearly and explicitly stated in the certificate in box 3 and is explicitly confirmed in the invoice in the "Country of Origin" section with text "mentioned above" referring to "PL". The land normalization rule considering Poland as valid country is applied, verifying match (rules 4.5.1, 4.5.4, 4.6).

overall_assessment.decision_summary: All main control points match according to the verification rules without conflicts or uncertainties.
overall_assessment.human_explanation: Alla kontrollpunkter stämmer mellan certifikatet och fakturan. Dokumenten kan godkännas automatiskt.
